items.title: Mission
items.desc: Track temperature in 4 rooms of a home, alert on anomalies, and let the homeowner answer 'was the heating off when we were away?' months later.

items.title: Audience
items.desc: One homeowner. Comfortable with a phone, not with a CLI. Will never SSH into anything.

items.title: Hard constraints
items.desc: Runs entirely on-premise: no cloud sync, no account, no internet dependency. Must survive a 2-week internet outage with full functionality.
